title: John Griffith
compiled_truth: John Griffith is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), John Griffith sent 317 and received 1058 emails, totalling 1375 interactions. Top correspondents: [Alexandra Villarreal](people/alexandra-villarreal) (74), [Ampaez](people/ampaez-earthlink) (59), [Dutch Quigley](people/dutch-quigley) (38), [Mike Maggi](people/mike-maggi) (28), [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (24). Mailbox folders observed: _exchange_pos, ace, deleted_items, inbox, personal, sent_items.
